arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Arsenal as two changes made but Caleb Okoli keeps place
arts.sum: Caleb Okoli has kept his place in the Leicester City starting line-up with Ruud van Nistelrooy making just two changes for the Premier League fixture against Arsenal. Okoli made his first start under van Nistelrooy in City's FA Cup loss at Manchester United, replacing the injured Jannik Vestergaard, and produced a decent performance.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'made enquiry' for 17-year-old Championship wonderkid after Man United January decision
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly running the rule over Stoke City sensation Jaden Dixon after making an approach to sign the fledgling defender on transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Arsenal - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as the Gunners aim to reduce deficit to league leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of Leicester vs Arsenal as Mikel Arteta's side look to close the gap to Premier League pace-setters Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans told they won't sign No.1 striker target - because Mikel Arteta is 'too afraid'
arts.sum: Arsenal are expected to sign a new striker in the summer after keeping their powder dry in January, but Troy Deeney has questioned whether Mikel Arteta really wants to sign a proper No.9

arts.ttl: Leicester City need plan of action for 13 players this summer
arts.sum: Of course, City could wait to see how players perform in the 25-26 campaign and then make a decision on their futures, but by then they will be at risk of other clubs offering them contracts. But what’s making this summer an especially busy one is not those players in the final few months’ of their contracts, but those whose deals expire in 2026.

arts.ttl: Arsenal missed out on Cesc Fabregas 2.0 as Real Madrid star confirms transfer rejection
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Federico Valverde reveals that he turned down the chance to sign for Arsenal at the age of 16, as he was never interested in moving to England.

arts.ttl: Why Leicester City supporters are wearing yellow against Arsenal and what is Project Reset
arts.sum: The group behind Project Reset feel strongly that LCFC needs fresh leadership at the board level, starting with a new director of football and appropriate supporting resources below this position. Project Reset, in a document titled 'The Five Dysfunctions of a Failing Football Club', outlined the reasons for fan dissatisfaction and the basis for the protest.

arts.ttl: Arsenal full squad revealed for Leicester City as Mikel Arteta faced unwanted dilemma
arts.sum: Arsenal will travel to Leicester City without a number of key players as Mikel Arteta's unfortunate time with injuries continues. Academy stars Khayon Edwards and Nathan Butler-Oyedeji are likely to be part of the matchday squad alongside Myles Lewis-Skelly and Ethan Nwaneri.

arts.ttl: How to watch Leicester City vs Arsenal - TV channel, live stream, kick-off time
arts.sum: It's a game that's been described as a "free hit" for Leicester City, one that no-one expects the Premier League strugglers to draw, let alone win. You could argue that is what happened when Leicester played Tottenham last month - their one win in nine league games - and what their supporters will be praying can happen again today at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Leicester v Arsenal LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Gunners face injury crisis
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s injury hit side look to close the gap on Liverpool at the top of the Premier League
